mapper.select: SELECT id, video_id, user_id, bvid, title, chunk_index, total_chunks, chunk_text, create_time FROM chunk WHERE video_id = #{videoId} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chunk (video_id, user_id, bvid, title, chunk_index, total_chunks, chunk_text, create_time) VALUES
(#{chunk.videoId}, #{chunk.userId}, #{chunk.bvid}, #{chunk.title}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.totalChunks}, #{chunk.chunkText}, #{chunk.createTime})
